reason: Verified that the agent can successfully use GitHub tools to identify the user and return their GitHub username after granting connected account access.
steps: Step 1: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with sidebar showing agents list
Step 2: Found and clicked the "QA-20260319-182446-hq9j" agent in the sidebar — Successfully navigated to agent chat view
Step 3: Verified agent status — Agent status showed "idle" (which meets the requirement of "running" or "idle")
Step 4: Sent message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." — Message was sent successfully and agent began processing
Step 5: Granted GitHub account access — Account access request card appeared asking for GitHub permission; selected GitHub account and clicked "Grant Access" button successfully
Step 6: Waited for response — Agent completed processing in 38 seconds (well within 4-minute timeout), returning status from "awaiting input" to "idle"

Step 7: Verified response includes GitHub username — Response clearly states "Your GitHub username is yiw190" along with additional GitHub account details (Pro plan, 3 public repos, 12 private repos, 2FA enabled)
